hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
nav_style: fixed top bar — always visible on scroll
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: moderate — scale, shadow change, color transitions
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: use a single accent color — everything else is grayscale
bonus_quirk: add a subtle scanline/CRT effect over the hero section
